raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, I gave a payment to XXXX XXXX XXXX for construction, that company had overwhelming times and did not come across and never did the job. I disputed with Amex on XX/XX/XXXX after I couldn't resolve it with the company. I asked Amex to dispute it. Amex came back declining for a reason I don't understand, something that this card was used between friends, and we need to resolve this ourselves... I used Amex in confidence cause I know they will secure me, but they don't wan na refund me the money
